name: calibration-dials
description: Calibrate Claude's interaction style with named-stop dials (Detail, Presentation, Tone, Rigor, Autonomy) that persist across sessions as a Claude Code output style. Includes /calibrate-studio for authoring and validating your own dials. The graphical dial widget is desktop-app only; terminal Claude Code auto-falls back to a native arrow-key picker, so it works on both. Requires python3 (>=3.8).
